---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Eat Good Uganda platform
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe the problem statement you're trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or implementation approach you have in mind.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User Impact
Who will benefit from this feature? How will it improve the user experience?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature requirement is clear
- [ ] User impact is understood
- [ ] Technical feasibility is confirmed

## Additional Context
Add any sketches, mockups, or additional information here.
